title: 《医学衷中参西录》公共底本、转录与版本线索

retrieval.method: HTTP GET with redirects and browser-compatible headers; Wikisource was read through its public MediaWiki parse API
retrieval.hashMeaning: SHA256 and bytes identify the exact HTML or JSON response retrieved for this audit; dynamic pages may later produce a different response hash.
retrieval.archivalBoundary: Only transformed metadata and short public-domain passage witnesses are stored here; fetched HTML and JSON remain outside the repository.

witnesses.edition: 《医学衷中参西录》，河北人民出版社 1977 年 2 版
witnesses.locator: 肺劳治法；论伤寒温病神昏谵语；流产后满闷；医案体例
witnesses.supports: Restores 肺脏具闟闢之机; reads 脉搏力减而谵语益甚; reads 若用开破之药开之，胀满去而其人或至于虚脱; confirms the recurring 病因、证候、诊断、处方、方解、效果 headings.
witnesses.excerpt: 肺臟具闟闢之機；脈搏力減，而譫語益甚；若用開破之藥開之，脹滿去而其人或至於虛脫
witnesses.limitations: An edited transcription based on a modern published edition, not a diplomatic scan transcription; it can collate characters but cannot by itself establish the earliest reading.

witnesses.supports: Provides a full public transcription and work metadata, but its 153 mechanically matched quotations are exactly the same set as the local source.
witnesses.excerpt: author = 张锡纯；times = 清；年 = 公元1909
witnesses.limitations: Because it repeats the local blank-character pattern and adds no unique quote matches, it is treated as the same transcription chain rather than an independent character-level vote.

witnesses.supports: Identifies 张锡纯 and 清 and exposes a public work index.
witnesses.excerpt: 作者：张锡纯；朝代：清；版本：暂缺
witnesses.limitations: The version field is explicitly 暂缺, so this page is not used to settle edition-specific readings.

witnesses.supports: Records a 清宣统元年天津新华印书局铅印本 edition lead for future scan inspection.
witnesses.excerpt: 清宣统元年天津新华印书局铅印本
witnesses.limitations: Bibliographic metadata only. No page image or passage was inspected in this audit, so it does not support any character-level correction.
